asset.title: Startup Diligence Live Join
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The video clearly demonstrates multi-user collaboration in a shared diligence room, showing real-time joining and trace updates.

featureClarity.evidence: Clear demonstration of room creation, code sharing, and multiple users joining the same session.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the complete flow from room creation to secondary and tertiary users joining and interacting.

visualDesign.evidence: Polished dark-mode interface with clear visual hierarchy and readable text elements.

consistency.evidence: Aligns perfectly with the NodeRoom concept, featuring the room binder, trace log, and copilot chat.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic capture of the web application interface with realistic user interactions and state updates.

legibility.evidence: Text, room codes, and chat messages remain legible throughout the walkthrough.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly demonstrates collaborative startup diligence, highly relevant for finance and banking workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately reflects multi-user states, including anonymous join tags and sequential trace events.

observedEvidence: Real-time updates in the Room Trace log

defects.observed: Sudden cut transition between Maya's perspective and Priya's landing page entry.
defects.fix: Add a subtle visual transition or label indicating a switch to a different user's browser window.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how multiple team members seamlessly join a shared startup diligence room using a unique room code to collaborate in real-time.
